[2019-02-13 05:32] cogito3 (Cogito): first, this set is way too fast for fabricator--arka is the one absorber that doesn't really slow down sets most of the time, and there isn't another absorber. but you both made that mistake, so it didn't decide the game
[2019-02-13 05:33] cogito3 (Cogito): i think your opponent won for two main reasons: 1) he made tarsiers and you made gauss cannons. tarsiers are a lot more efficient than cannons (especially in this set, where you have cluster bolt as a green attacker)
[2019-02-13 05:34] cogito3 (Cogito): 2) you got arka first. arka is strange in that it's an absorber that denies absorb (because it costs attack). notice that when your opponent made counter arka, he only dealt 1 damage into your arka. this effectively denied 5 of your absorb, while your arka only denied him 2 absorb (off wall)
[2019-02-13 05:34] cogito3 (Cogito): that's why generally you wait to get arka until you can get at least 3-4 absorb on it when your opponent goes counter arka
[2019-02-13 05:35] cogito3 (Cogito): (as always in this game, there are exceptions)
[2019-02-13 05:43] masn6811 (Masne98888): arka actually tends to slow down sets a good amount if theres no other big absorber
[2019-02-13 05:43] masn6811 (Masne98888): firstly, because you need to have the econ to support BBA. its a similar story to why wincer is 3 engis
[2019-02-13 05:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): and secondly, because you want to hit 7 attack right after your opponent, thus you want to have slightly more econ than your opponent
[2019-02-13 05:44] masn6811 (Masne98888): (technically, you want as much econ as you can get while still being able to hit 7 attack 0.5 turns after your opponent instead of 1.5 turns)
[2019-02-13 05:45] masn6811 (Masne98888): (this becomes less true when theres another good absorber, because the first arka is denying a higher proportion of absorber relative to the second arka)
[2019-02-13 05:46] mrguy888: Without anything good to spend blue on and no good soak or absorb and a strong low econ attacker like smorcus you can actually just go below arka i think
[2019-02-13 05:46] mrguy888: At least make it really really hard for someone to set up for arka
[2019-02-13 05:47] mrguy888: bba costs 16 total gold and 7 damage is also quite expensive. how do you do all that without dying?

[2019-02-21 07:00] mrguy888: In the second one I disagree with venge all in cause losing cent is really bad, skipping cent is really bad, wasting red is bad, and buying animus units in bp is bad. You gotta do some of those bad things to venge all in. The first game is more interesting but I have some issues with the execution.

You skip xeno, the best absorber. You make 9 conduits which is too many. If you wanna venge all in there you wanna do a slower burn of drones. People like saving up to make as many venges in a single turn as they can, but floating so much green is quite inefficient. BB tech only takes 5 gold to spend so if you are slowly making venges, you can easily spend all your tech while saving up defence to get absorb after you run out of drones. The set even has gmech so 2 forges is, in a sense, less tech in the long run.

5 or 6 conduits, 2 forges for the good absorber, and a slower transition would be a better style of play to venge all in

As far as the set goes, non prompt defence is the bane of big venge explosions because they can use your low pressure turns to spend all their tech on bulls, innervis, and xenos. Building up green should make your opponent have uncomfortable decisions between inefficiently buying prompt defenders vs no damage and buying inefficient emergency defenders against your big sudden push.
